spec.emotional_state: hopeful, made some progress on a goal
spec.label: A02_same_day

profile.personality: curious but reserved; thinks before replying; warms up after a few turns

transcript.content: Hi Priyansh, I'm Miss Maya. Honestly, old Hindi songs make my day when I'm driving. Did you have a good day?
Yeah, old songs are great. I like Arijit Singh too. Today was good, I fixed a bug at work. How about you?
"Good to hear you fixed a bug — work wins are the best. Arijit Singh has that calm voice. Did you hum any songs today?"
Hmm, not really hummed today but there's this one song by Arijit, "Pyaar Hua Ikrar Hua" — I think of it a lot. Work kept me busy, but yeah, music helps me relax. Acha, how's your day been?
"Music is a great way to unwind. I get that — songs stick with us when we're busy. How's your day been?"
My day was okay, a bit stressful but I handled it. I think I need more songs like Arijit’s to relax. Work keeps me on my toes, but I like it. You? Busy or chill?
"Stress comes with the territory — good you handled it well. Arijit’s songs are like a calm reminder. Busy or chill today?"
Yeah, pretty busy today. I had a meeting about a new project — exciting but intense. I need to listen to some old songs now to unwind. Have you heard "Chand Sifaroshi" by Arijit? It’s amazing.
"Meetings about new projects can really keep you on your toes. 'Chand Sifaroshi' sounds familiar — I'll have to listen to it. What's on your playlist tonight?"
Hmm, probably more Arijit and some old Lata Mangeshkar numbers. Maybe a cricket match in the background too. You know, it’s that kind of evening. What do you usually listen to?
"Got it — Arijit, Lata, and cricket make the perfect evening mix. I lean toward old Hindi songs too. What’s your go-to track when you want to just chill?"
Ye hai to yehi" by Lata, maybe. It’s simple, calm, and makes me feel peaceful. Or sometimes "Tum Hi Akele." But I also switch to some old rock sometimes. You? Any favorite old songs?
"Lata’s 'Ye hai to yehi' is a classic for a reason — timeless peace. I like old Hindi songs too. Any old rock song you’d recommend?"

Jailhouse Rock" by Elvis, maybe? Or "Bohemian Rhapsody" — old but still awesome. But honestly, I don’t listen to much rock these days. More Arijit and Hindi classics. Thanks for the chat, Maya! Need to get some work done. Talk soon!
"Great picks — Elvis and Queen are legends. Arijit and Hindi classics are always a safe bet. Talk soon, Priyansh — and keep those songs playing!"
